calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-25-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Linda Forster, CSR #7235.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
Ernest Knowles, Vice President for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Michael Heath, Esq. appeared with defendant Salvador A. Alvarenga, who was placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Placed of Trial was filed on January 10, 2008.

The Stipulated Judgment reached by the parties was read into the record by Mr. Holloway. In accordance with the terms of the agreement, judgment shall be entered for plaintiff Bank of the West, and against defendant Salvador A. Alvarenga in the amount of $70,000.00 in principle and $12,500.00 in attorney's fees, for a total judgment in the amount of $82,500.00. Plaintiff may file an abstract of judgment, but shall take no further action to collect on the stipulated judgment provided Salvador A. Alvarenga adheres to the following payment schedule:

Commencing September 1, 2008 - $500.00 per month for six months, with payments due on the first of each month.
Commencing March 1, 2009 - $1,250.00 per month for twelve months, with payments due on the first of each month.
Commencing March 1, 2010 - $1,500.00 per month for eighteen months, with payments due on the first of each month.
A baloon payment in the amount of $25,000.00 shall be due on or before October 11, 2011.

If defendants fail to comply with the terms of the Agreement set forth above, plaintiff shall engage in any legal collection procedures after two defaults by defendant, and ten day notice via facsimile to defendant's counsel, and mail to defendant.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed stipulated judgment to the Court no later than August 28, 2008.

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2008 Continued To Aug-25-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2008 Set For Trial On May-05-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

APPEARANCES: RAYMOND BURKE, ESQUIRE (415.931.4207) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. THERE ARE NO OTHER APPEARANCES.
RULING: COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: DENISE DOUCETTE, CSR 5963.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2007 Continued To Jan-18-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Oct-23-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: K. Farnsworth.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering of the filed declartion, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Salvador A. Alvarenga as follows:
Damages $107,574.41
Prejudgment Interest $4,744.67
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $377.50, for a total of $115,196.58
Plaintiff is also entitled to the immediate possession of the leased equipment listed in the Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2007 Continued To Dec-07-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
